title: Lean more on active task context in compact-tool ranking and follow-through
Expose deferred-surface lag, dirty revisions, and hot-path diagnostics explicitly
Replace bridge credential adoption with worktree-slot attachment and worktree-executor authorization

Add bounded hot-state pruning and an archive plane for summary, runtime, task, and claim data, including continuity metadata and archive-aware read behavior so active coordination scales with current work instead of repository age.
Rewrite docs, MCP self-description, and operator guidance around the federated runtime model
